TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pisetek no Amilika to kakiharan rikec no Taywan == I 1979 miheca 3 folad 28 romi'ad mihayda ko Kararemay pikaykian no Amilika to "kakiharan rikec no Taywan" (Taiwan Relations Act, TRA) saka tosa romi'ad mihayda ko Fafa'eday pikaykian, pakayni i congtong no Amilika ci Jimmy Carteran toya miheca 4 folad 10 romi'ad mitilid to ngangan a masaheci. O kalatatiih no Congko ato Russia saka falic no satao' to kacacofelan a demak no Amilika ​Patelocan no miheca i 1960 i, malatiih ko kakiharan no Russia ato Congko, madadoedo itira i kawali sa'amis, Xinjiang a masasiwtoc. Oya Komintang ni Chiang Kai-shek a sakowan misada'ek'ek to kalalood no Kyosanto, caay ka harateng, kalatiih no Russia ato Congko i, kalalengatan no salaloma'an no Amilika a nikapolongan (Konghe, Minco) tasaay kasarekad sakafalic to Congko a satao'. ​​O Amilika ko kakeridan no kaetipay hekal sakapot, itini ci Henry Alfred Kissinger ko todong no kaitiraan to kacacofelan satao' a demak ko pakayraan, mipalalenay to 'icel a sasowalen, misatapang misapinang o Congko ko mipatolasay to Russia sanay sapilood katadamaanan, saka misarocod a sapisepingan to Congko. ​​​Raoma to pakayraan, o "kaciepoc no kacacofelan a demak" pakayraan ko sakedec laloma'an no Amilika, paretatenga o nisateked a mikowanay ci Chiang Kai-shek, o mikelotay ko pikowan, halafin ko piepec mikari'ang to masaromaay harateng a tamdaw, caay ka tatodong i nipakoniraay, nikapolongan, salongocay ciepocay harateng no Amilika. Malaplap no Linhoko ko todong ni Chiang Kai-shek dayhiw no Congko ​I 1971 miheca, mihayda mitelak ko Linhoko to saka 2758 haw, o PRC ko mikotayay to ROC dayhiw no Congko kamaro'an i Linhoko. ​​I'ayaw no pitelek no Linhoko, KMT satekeday pikowan itira ci Chiang Kai-shek safelot saan, kinapinapina mina'ay to pikeroh no Amilika, Dipong ato Europ a kasakitakit to "Tosaay a Congko", "falicen ko ngangan padoedo ko kacingangan" a pakayraan, ikor sato ferot sato a malaplap miliyas to Linhoko. ​​​Sakilaloma' a pisinting no KMT i "caay ka tomireng ko tosaay satamdaway tatiihay", "o niyah sa ko miliyasay to Linhoko", himed hananay to ni Chiang Kai-shek ko moraraway tadamaanay a kacacofelan a demak. nikawrira, caay pakatafo ko dadokap to lamal, malasawad to ko kacitodong no Conghuaminko i kasakitakit i, dadoedo sato miteka ko kasasawad to kacacofelan a demak. ​​​​I 1972 miheca 9 folad 29 romi'ad, mihapiw ko Dipong to kasasawad to Conghuaminko; Amilika pakayni ci Richard Milhous Nixon, Gerald Ford tosaay congtong patireng to kacacofelan a demak to Congko, nanoya i 1978 miheca 12 folad 16 romi'ad, o congtong no Amilika ci Jimmy Carter pakayni i kacacofelan a demak pakafana' ci Chiang Ching-kuoan, i 1979 miheca 1 folad 1 romi'ad malalicinowas to Conghuaminko, pasiCongko to ko kalakacacofelan a demak. O sifo ni Jimmy Carter to saki Taywan a satao' kalaliyangan to no laocan no Lipoyin ​O sapisalof i ikor to kalaliyas no Conghuaminko a kakiharan no Taywan Amilika, o sifo ni Jimmy Carter ona pasadak to "sarikec kapolongan to Taywan", talacowa, onini a sarikec dengan sakilali'aca, ponka, pirakarak no finawlan ko kacacofel no demak, mato makodihay, awaay sakitodong to sakarihaday no Taywan ato sakadama a salongoc no tamdaw. ​​O sifo ni Jimmy Carter kahemaw ko pinangan to sakisatao' to Taywan, malo sakalaliyang no Fafa'eday pikaykian, Kararemay pikaykian no Amilika, padadoedo saan a lomaoc maaini to kasasiroma a painiay. O 6 Taywan tamdaw micikerohay to Kakiharan rikec no Amilika to Taywan pacomod i salongoc telakan ​I 1979 miheca 2 folad, matahidang no Fafa'eday pikaykian no Amilika ci Chen Wenyuan, Wang Nengxiang, Chen Tangshan, Xu Fuyuan aci Zhang Xucheng mikihatiya to satengil a sa'opo, oya ci Peng Mingmin itira i Fafa'eday pikaykian ko aro' satengil a sa'opo pawacay itiya. ​​A 6 dayhiw no Taywan a tamdaw, ira ko sasepatay nano o sakapot no Taywan satekedan patireng to kitakit a lekapot, orasaka itira i kalomaocan no pikaykian no Amilika pacecay to o satekeden ko Taywan, caay ka citodong to Congko. A 6 dayhiw nanoyaan sa miliyang to pikowan no KMT, mipacefad to Amilika talifokilen ko saka rihaday no Taywan ato saka dama salongoc a finawlan no Taywan, mi'ang'ang to Amilika to sapi'epec to sakowan na Chiang Kai-shek o fafalicen, misanga'ay to finawlan no Taywan. ​​​Ikor sato oya Kararemay pikaykian, Fafa'eday pikaykian laocan no Amilika mifalic to nano sifo ni Jimmy Carter satao', patongal halo sapa'aca to sakalalood i Taywan, salongoc no Taywan a kacitodong a setelek, ikor mahayda ko no laocan a "Kakiharan rikec no Amilika to Taywan", ta mapatayra i congtong ci Jimmy Carter a mipangangan. ​​​​Nai "Kakiharan rikec no Amilika to Taywan" a nitelekan manengneng to, talacowa o sifo no Amilika o sakanga'ay sakaira no kitakit mafalic ko kacacofelan a demak satao', nikawrira, o nikapolongan satelek no Amilika matatodong malaheci ko sapipatodong, itini i Kararemay pikaykian, Fafa'eday pikaykian laocan, 'aloman ko micokeray a iing, adayay mikeharay to Taywqan. ​​​​​Milifet milongoc to laocan no Amilika, o sakafiyol ato sakafalic sifo no Amilika to satao' to Taywan, nanoyaan sato o finawlan no Taywan milongoc to sadama no Amilika to pakayraan no Taywan. ​​​​​Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay
S.PHON: == pisətək no~u amiɾika to~u kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan == i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħajɬ~ɮa ko~u kararəmaj pikajkian no~u amiɾika to~u "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan" (taiwan rəɾatio~uns aʦt, tra) saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħajɬ~ɮa ko~u fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian, pakajni i ʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi *immj ʦartəran to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u ŋaŋan a masaħəʦi. o~u kaɾatatiiħ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ato~u ro~u~ussia saka faɾiʦ no~u satao~uʡ to~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u amiɾika *patəɾo~uʦan no~u miħəʦa i **** i, maɾatiiħ ko~u kakiħaran no~u ro~u~ussia ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u, maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u itira i kawaɾi saʡamis, xinjiaŋ a masasiwto~uʦ. o~uja ko~umintaŋ ni ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək a sako~uwan misaɬ~ɮaʡəkʡək to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u kjo~usanto~u, ʦaaj ka ħaratəŋ, kaɾatiiħ no~u ro~u~ussia ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u i, kaɾaɾəŋatan no~u saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u amiɾika a nikapo~uɾo~uŋan (ko~uŋħə, minʦo~u) tasaaj kasarəkaɬ~ɮ sakafaɾiʦ to~u ʦo~uŋko~u a satao~uʡ. **o~u amiɾika ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kaətipaj ħəkaɾ sakapo~ut, itini ʦi ħənrj aɾfrəɬ~ɮ kissiŋər ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u kaitiraan to~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan satao~uʡ a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u pakajraan, mipaɾaɾənaj to~u ʡiʦəɾ a saso~uwaɾən, misatapaŋ misapinaŋ o~u ʦo~uŋko~u ko~u mipato~uɾasaj to~u ro~u~ussia sanaj sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ kataɬ~ɮamaanan, saka misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ a sapisəpiŋan to~u ʦo~uŋko~u. ***rao~uma to~u pakajraan, o~u "kaʦiəpo~uʦ no~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak" pakajraan ko~u sakəɬ~ɮəʦ ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u amiɾika, parətatəŋa o~u nisatəkəɬ~ɮ a miko~uwanaj ʦi ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək, o~u mikəɾo~utaj ko~u piko~uwan, ħaɾafin ko~u piəpəʦ mikariʡaŋ to~u masaro~umaaj ħaratəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i nipako~uniraaj, nikapo~uɾo~uŋan, saɾo~uŋo~uʦaj ʦiəpo~uʦaj ħaratəŋ no~u amiɾika. maɾapɾap no~u ɾinħo~uko~u ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ni ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u ʦo~uŋko~u *i **** miħəʦa, miħajɬ~ɮa mitəɾak ko~u ɾinħo~uko~u to~u saka **** ħaw, o~u prʦ ko~u miko~utajaj to~u ro~uʦ ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u ʦo~uŋko~u kamaro~uʡan i ɾinħo~uko~u. **iʡajaw no~u pitəɾək no~u ɾinħo~uko~u, kmt satəkəɬ~ɮaj piko~uwan itira ʦi ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək safəɾo~ut saan, kinapinapina minaʡaj to~u pikəro~uħ no~u amiɾika, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u əo~u~uro~up a kasakitakit to~u "to~usaaj a ʦo~uŋko~u", "faɾiʦən ko~u ŋaŋan paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan" a pakajraan, iko~ur sato~u fəro~ut sato~u a maɾapɾap miɾijas to~u ɾinħo~uko~u. ***sakiɾaɾo~umaʡ a pisintiŋ no~u kmt i "ʦaaj ka to~umirəŋ ko~u to~usaaj satamɬ~ɮawaj tatiiħaj", "o~u nijaħ sa ko~u miɾijasaj to~u ɾinħo~uko~u", ħiməɬ~ɮ ħananaj to~u ni ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək ko~u mo~urarawaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj a kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak. nikawrira, ʦaaj pakatafo~u ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~ukap to~u ɾamaɾ, maɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u i kasakitakit i, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sato~u mitəka ko~u kasasawaɬ~ɮ to~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak. ****i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miħapiw ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u kasasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u; amiɾika pakajni ʦi riʦħarɬ~ɮ miɾħo~uo~u~us nixo~un, *əraɾɬ~ɮ fo~urɬ~ɮ to~usaaj ʦo~uŋto~uŋ patirəŋ to~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak to~u ʦo~uŋko~u, nano~uja i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi *immj ʦartər pakajni i kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak pakafanaʡ ʦi ʦħiaŋ ʦħiŋ-ko~u~uo~uan, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾaɾiʦino~uwas to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u, pasiʦo~uŋko~u to~u ko~u kaɾakaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u sifo~u ni *immj ʦartər to~u saki tajwan a satao~uʡ kaɾaɾijaŋan to~u no~u ɾao~uʦan no~u ɾipo~ujin *o~u sapisaɾo~uf i iko~ur to~u kaɾaɾijas no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u a kakiħaran no~u tajwan amiɾika, o~u sifo~u ni *immj ʦartər o~una pasaɬ~ɮak to~u "sarikəʦ kapo~uɾo~uŋan to~u tajwan", taɾaʦo~uwa, o~unini a sarikəʦ ɬ~ɮəŋan sakiɾaɾiʡaʦa, po~unka, pirakarak no~u finawɾan ko~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, mato~u mako~uɬ~ɮiħaj, awaaj sakito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sakariħaɬ~ɮaj no~u tajwan ato~u sakaɬ~ɮama a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **o~u sifo~u ni *immj ʦartər kaħəmaw ko~u pinaŋan to~u sakisatao~uʡ to~u tajwan, maɾo~u sakaɾaɾijaŋ no~u fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian, kararəmaj pikajkian no~u amiɾika, paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u saan a ɾo~umao~uʦ maaini to~u kasasiro~uma a painiaj. o~u * tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw miʦikəro~uħaj to~u kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u amiɾika to~u tajwan paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i saɾo~uŋo~uʦ təɾakan *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian no~u amiɾika ʦi ʦħən wənjo~u~uan, waŋ nəŋxiaŋ, ʦħən taŋsħan, xo~u~u fo~u~ujo~u~uan aʦi *ħaŋ xo~u~uʦħəŋ mikiħatija to~u satəŋiɾ a saʡo~upo~u, o~uja ʦi pəŋ miŋmin itira i fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian ko~u aro~uʡ satəŋiɾ a saʡo~upo~u pawaʦaj itija. **a * ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, ira ko~u sasəpataj nano~u o~u sakapo~ut no~u tajwan satəkəɬ~ɮan patirəŋ to~u kitakit a ɾəkapo~ut, o~urasaka itira i kaɾo~umao~uʦan no~u pikajkian no~u amiɾika paʦəʦaj to~u o~u satəkəɬ~ɮən ko~u tajwan, ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ʦo~uŋko~u. a * ɬ~ɮajħiw nano~ujaan sa miɾijaŋ to~u piko~uwan no~u kmt, mipaʦəfaɬ~ɮ to~u amiɾika taɾifo~ukiɾən ko~u saka riħaɬ~ɮaj no~u tajwan ato~u saka ɬ~ɮama saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a finawɾan no~u tajwan, miʡaŋʡaŋ to~u amiɾika to~u sapiʡəpəʦ to~u sako~uwan na ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək o~u fafaɾiʦən, misaŋaʡaj to~u finawɾan no~u tajwan. ***iko~ur sato~u o~uja kararəmaj pikajkian, fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian ɾao~uʦan no~u amiɾika mifaɾiʦ to~u nano~u sifo~u ni *immj ʦartər satao~uʡ, pato~uŋaɾ ħaɾo~u sapaʡaʦa to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i tajwan, saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tajwan a kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a sətəɾək, iko~ur maħajɬ~ɮa ko~u no~u ɾao~uʦan a "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u amiɾika to~u tajwan", ta mapatajra i ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *immj ʦartər a mipaŋaŋan. ****nai "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u amiɾika to~u tajwan" a nitəɾəkan manəŋnəŋ to~u, taɾaʦo~uwa o~u sifo~u no~u amiɾika o~u sakaŋaʡaj sakaira no~u kitakit mafaɾiʦ ko~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak satao~uʡ, nikawrira, o~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan satəɾək no~u amiɾika matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ maɾaħəʦi ko~u sapipato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, itini i kararəmaj pikajkian, fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian ɾao~uʦan, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u miʦo~ukəraj a iiŋ, aɬ~ɮajaj mikəħaraj to~u tajw*an. *****miɾifət miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ɾao~uʦan no~u amiɾika, o~u sakafijo~uɾ ato~u sakafaɾiʦ sifo~u no~u amiɾika to~u satao~uʡ to~u tajwan, nano~ujaan sato~u o~u finawɾan no~u tajwan miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u saɬ~ɮama no~u amiɾika to~u pakajraan no~u tajwan. *****sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj
S.FORM: == Pisetek no Amilika to kakiharan rikec no Taywan == I 1979 miheca 3 folad 28 romi'ad mihayda ko Kararemay pikaykian no Amilika to "kakiharan rikec no Taywan" (Taiwan Relations Act, TRA) saka tosa romi'ad mihayda ko Fafa'eday pikaykian, pakayni i congtong no Amilika ci Jimmy Carteran toya miheca 4 folad 10 romi'ad mitilid to ngangan a masaheci. O kalatatiih no Congko ato Russia saka falic no satao' to kacacofelan a demak no Amilika ​Patelocan no miheca i 1960 i, malatiih ko kakiharan no Russia ato Congko, madadoedo itira i kawali sa'amis, Xinjiang a masasiwtoc. Oya Komintang ni Chiang Kai-shek a sakowan misada'ek'ek to kalalood no Kyosanto, caay ka harateng, kalatiih no Russia ato Congko i, kalalengatan no salaloma'an no Amilika a nikapolongan (Konghe, Minco) tasaay kasarekad sakafalic to Congko a satao'. ​​O Amilika ko kakeridan no kaetipay hekal sakapot, itini ci Henry Alfred Kissinger ko todong no kaitiraan to kacacofelan satao' a demak ko pakayraan, mipalalenay to 'icel a sasowalen, misatapang misapinang o Congko ko mipatolasay to Russia sanay sapilood katadamaanan, saka misarocod a sapisepingan to Congko. ​​​Raoma to pakayraan, o "kaciepoc no kacacofelan a demak" pakayraan ko sakedec laloma'an no Amilika, paretatenga o nisateked a mikowanay ci Chiang Kai-shek, o mikelotay ko pikowan, halafin ko piepec mikari'ang to masaromaay harateng a tamdaw, caay ka tatodong i nipakoniraay, nikapolongan, salongocay ciepocay harateng no Amilika. Malaplap no Linhoko ko todong ni Chiang Kai-shek dayhiw no Congko ​I 1971 miheca, mihayda mitelak ko Linhoko to saka 2758 haw, o PRC ko mikotayay to ROC dayhiw no Congko kamaro'an i Linhoko. ​​I'ayaw no pitelek no Linhoko, KMT satekeday pikowan itira ci Chiang Kai-shek safelot saan, kinapinapina mina'ay to pikeroh no Amilika, Dipong ato Europ a kasakitakit to "Tosaay a Congko", "falicen ko ngangan padoedo ko kacingangan" a pakayraan, ikor sato ferot sato a malaplap miliyas to Linhoko. ​​​Sakilaloma' a pisinting no KMT i "caay ka tomireng ko tosaay satamdaway tatiihay", "o niyah sa ko miliyasay to Linhoko", himed hananay to ni Chiang Kai-shek ko moraraway tadamaanay a kacacofelan a demak. nikawrira, caay pakatafo ko dadokap to lamal, malasawad to ko kacitodong no Conghuaminko i kasakitakit i, dadoedo sato miteka ko kasasawad to kacacofelan a demak. ​​​​I 1972 miheca 9 folad 29 romi'ad, mihapiw ko Dipong to kasasawad to Conghuaminko; Amilika pakayni ci Richard Milhous Nixon, Gerald Ford tosaay congtong patireng to kacacofelan a demak to Congko, nanoya i 1978 miheca 12 folad 16 romi'ad, o congtong no Amilika ci Jimmy Carter pakayni i kacacofelan a demak pakafana' ci Chiang Ching-kuoan, i 1979 miheca 1 folad 1 romi'ad malalicinowas to Conghuaminko, pasiCongko to ko kalakacacofelan a demak. O sifo ni Jimmy Carter to saki Taywan a satao' kalaliyangan to no laocan no Lipoyin ​O sapisalof i ikor to kalaliyas no Conghuaminko a kakiharan no Taywan Amilika, o sifo ni Jimmy Carter ona pasadak to "sarikec kapolongan to Taywan", talacowa, onini a sarikec dengan sakilali'aca, ponka, pirakarak no finawlan ko kacacofel no demak, mato makodihay, awaay sakitodong to sakarihaday no Taywan ato sakadama a salongoc no tamdaw. ​​O sifo ni Jimmy Carter kahemaw ko pinangan to sakisatao' to Taywan, malo sakalaliyang no Fafa'eday pikaykian, Kararemay pikaykian no Amilika, padadoedo saan a lomaoc maaini to kasasiroma a painiay. O 6 Taywan tamdaw micikerohay to Kakiharan rikec no Amilika to Taywan pacomod i salongoc telakan ​I 1979 miheca 2 folad, matahidang no Fafa'eday pikaykian no Amilika ci Chen Wenyuan, Wang Nengxiang, Chen Tangshan, Xu Fuyuan aci Zhang Xucheng mikihatiya to satengil a sa'opo, oya ci Peng Mingmin itira i Fafa'eday pikaykian ko aro' satengil a sa'opo pawacay itiya. ​​A 6 dayhiw no Taywan a tamdaw, ira ko sasepatay nano o sakapot no Taywan satekedan patireng to kitakit a lekapot, orasaka itira i kalomaocan no pikaykian no Amilika pacecay to o satekeden ko Taywan, caay ka citodong to Congko. A 6 dayhiw nanoyaan sa miliyang to pikowan no KMT, mipacefad to Amilika talifokilen ko saka rihaday no Taywan ato saka dama salongoc a finawlan no Taywan, mi'ang'ang to Amilika to sapi'epec to sakowan na Chiang Kai-shek o fafalicen, misanga'ay to finawlan no Taywan. ​​​Ikor sato oya Kararemay pikaykian, Fafa'eday pikaykian laocan no Amilika mifalic to nano sifo ni Jimmy Carter satao', patongal halo sapa'aca to sakalalood i Taywan, salongoc no Taywan a kacitodong a setelek, ikor mahayda ko no laocan a "Kakiharan rikec no Amilika to Taywan", ta mapatayra i congtong ci Jimmy Carter a mipangangan. ​​​​Nai "Kakiharan rikec no Amilika to Taywan" a nitelekan manengneng to, talacowa o sifo no Amilika o sakanga'ay sakaira no kitakit mafalic ko kacacofelan a demak satao', nikawrira, o nikapolongan satelek no Amilika matatodong malaheci ko sapipatodong, itini i Kararemay pikaykian, Fafa'eday pikaykian laocan, 'aloman ko micokeray a iing, adayay mikeharay to Taywqan. ​​​​​Milifet milongoc to laocan no Amilika, o sakafiyol ato sakafalic sifo no Amilika to satao' to Taywan, nanoyaan sato o finawlan no Taywan milongoc to sadama no Amilika to pakayraan no Taywan. ​​​​​Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay
S.PHON: == pisətək no~u amiɾika to~u kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan == i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħajɬ~ɮa ko~u kararəmaj pikajkian no~u amiɾika to~u "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan" (taiwan rəɾatio~uns aʦt, tra) saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħajɬ~ɮa ko~u fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian, pakajni i ʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi *immj ʦartəran to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u ŋaŋan a masaħəʦi. o~u kaɾatatiiħ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ato~u ro~u~ussia saka faɾiʦ no~u satao~uʡ to~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u amiɾika *patəɾo~uʦan no~u miħəʦa i **** i, maɾatiiħ ko~u kakiħaran no~u ro~u~ussia ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u, maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u itira i kawaɾi saʡamis, xinjiaŋ a masasiwto~uʦ. o~uja ko~umintaŋ ni ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək a sako~uwan misaɬ~ɮaʡəkʡək to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u kjo~usanto~u, ʦaaj ka ħaratəŋ, kaɾatiiħ no~u ro~u~ussia ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u i, kaɾaɾəŋatan no~u saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u amiɾika a nikapo~uɾo~uŋan (ko~uŋħə, minʦo~u) tasaaj kasarəkaɬ~ɮ sakafaɾiʦ to~u ʦo~uŋko~u a satao~uʡ. **o~u amiɾika ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kaətipaj ħəkaɾ sakapo~ut, itini ʦi ħənrj aɾfrəɬ~ɮ kissiŋər ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u kaitiraan to~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan satao~uʡ a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u pakajraan, mipaɾaɾənaj to~u ʡiʦəɾ a saso~uwaɾən, misatapaŋ misapinaŋ o~u ʦo~uŋko~u ko~u mipato~uɾasaj to~u ro~u~ussia sanaj sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ kataɬ~ɮamaanan, saka misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ a sapisəpiŋan to~u ʦo~uŋko~u. ***rao~uma to~u pakajraan, o~u "kaʦiəpo~uʦ no~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak" pakajraan ko~u sakəɬ~ɮəʦ ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u amiɾika, parətatəŋa o~u nisatəkəɬ~ɮ a miko~uwanaj ʦi ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək, o~u mikəɾo~utaj ko~u piko~uwan, ħaɾafin ko~u piəpəʦ mikariʡaŋ to~u masaro~umaaj ħaratəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i nipako~uniraaj, nikapo~uɾo~uŋan, saɾo~uŋo~uʦaj ʦiəpo~uʦaj ħaratəŋ no~u amiɾika. maɾapɾap no~u ɾinħo~uko~u ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ni ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u ʦo~uŋko~u *i **** miħəʦa, miħajɬ~ɮa mitəɾak ko~u ɾinħo~uko~u to~u saka **** ħaw, o~u prʦ ko~u miko~utajaj to~u ro~uʦ ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u ʦo~uŋko~u kamaro~uʡan i ɾinħo~uko~u. **iʡajaw no~u pitəɾək no~u ɾinħo~uko~u, kmt satəkəɬ~ɮaj piko~uwan itira ʦi ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək safəɾo~ut saan, kinapinapina minaʡaj to~u pikəro~uħ no~u amiɾika, ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u əo~u~uro~up a kasakitakit to~u "to~usaaj a ʦo~uŋko~u", "faɾiʦən ko~u ŋaŋan paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ko~u kaʦiŋaŋan" a pakajraan, iko~ur sato~u fəro~ut sato~u a maɾapɾap miɾijas to~u ɾinħo~uko~u. ***sakiɾaɾo~umaʡ a pisintiŋ no~u kmt i "ʦaaj ka to~umirəŋ ko~u to~usaaj satamɬ~ɮawaj tatiiħaj", "o~u nijaħ sa ko~u miɾijasaj to~u ɾinħo~uko~u", ħiməɬ~ɮ ħananaj to~u ni ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək ko~u mo~urarawaj taɬ~ɮamaanaj a kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak. nikawrira, ʦaaj pakatafo~u ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~ukap to~u ɾamaɾ, maɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u i kasakitakit i, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sato~u mitəka ko~u kasasawaɬ~ɮ to~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak. ****i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miħapiw ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u kasasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u; amiɾika pakajni ʦi riʦħarɬ~ɮ miɾħo~uo~u~us nixo~un, *əraɾɬ~ɮ fo~urɬ~ɮ to~usaaj ʦo~uŋto~uŋ patirəŋ to~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak to~u ʦo~uŋko~u, nano~uja i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ no~u amiɾika ʦi *immj ʦartər pakajni i kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak pakafanaʡ ʦi ʦħiaŋ ʦħiŋ-ko~u~uo~uan, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾaɾiʦino~uwas to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u, pasiʦo~uŋko~u to~u ko~u kaɾakaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u sifo~u ni *immj ʦartər to~u saki tajwan a satao~uʡ kaɾaɾijaŋan to~u no~u ɾao~uʦan no~u ɾipo~ujin *o~u sapisaɾo~uf i iko~ur to~u kaɾaɾijas no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u a kakiħaran no~u tajwan amiɾika, o~u sifo~u ni *immj ʦartər o~una pasaɬ~ɮak to~u "sarikəʦ kapo~uɾo~uŋan to~u tajwan", taɾaʦo~uwa, o~unini a sarikəʦ ɬ~ɮəŋan sakiɾaɾiʡaʦa, po~unka, pirakarak no~u finawɾan ko~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, mato~u mako~uɬ~ɮiħaj, awaaj sakito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sakariħaɬ~ɮaj no~u tajwan ato~u sakaɬ~ɮama a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **o~u sifo~u ni *immj ʦartər kaħəmaw ko~u pinaŋan to~u sakisatao~uʡ to~u tajwan, maɾo~u sakaɾaɾijaŋ no~u fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian, kararəmaj pikajkian no~u amiɾika, paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u saan a ɾo~umao~uʦ maaini to~u kasasiro~uma a painiaj. o~u * tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw miʦikəro~uħaj to~u kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u amiɾika to~u tajwan paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i saɾo~uŋo~uʦ təɾakan *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian no~u amiɾika ʦi ʦħən wənjo~u~uan, waŋ nəŋxiaŋ, ʦħən taŋsħan, xo~u~u fo~u~ujo~u~uan aʦi *ħaŋ xo~u~uʦħəŋ mikiħatija to~u satəŋiɾ a saʡo~upo~u, o~uja ʦi pəŋ miŋmin itira i fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian ko~u aro~uʡ satəŋiɾ a saʡo~upo~u pawaʦaj itija. **a * ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, ira ko~u sasəpataj nano~u o~u sakapo~ut no~u tajwan satəkəɬ~ɮan patirəŋ to~u kitakit a ɾəkapo~ut, o~urasaka itira i kaɾo~umao~uʦan no~u pikajkian no~u amiɾika paʦəʦaj to~u o~u satəkəɬ~ɮən ko~u tajwan, ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ʦo~uŋko~u. a * ɬ~ɮajħiw nano~ujaan sa miɾijaŋ to~u piko~uwan no~u kmt, mipaʦəfaɬ~ɮ to~u amiɾika taɾifo~ukiɾən ko~u saka riħaɬ~ɮaj no~u tajwan ato~u saka ɬ~ɮama saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a finawɾan no~u tajwan, miʡaŋʡaŋ to~u amiɾika to~u sapiʡəpəʦ to~u sako~uwan na ʦħiaŋ kai-sħək o~u fafaɾiʦən, misaŋaʡaj to~u finawɾan no~u tajwan. ***iko~ur sato~u o~uja kararəmaj pikajkian, fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian ɾao~uʦan no~u amiɾika mifaɾiʦ to~u nano~u sifo~u ni *immj ʦartər satao~uʡ, pato~uŋaɾ ħaɾo~u sapaʡaʦa to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i tajwan, saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u tajwan a kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a sətəɾək, iko~ur maħajɬ~ɮa ko~u no~u ɾao~uʦan a "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u amiɾika to~u tajwan", ta mapatajra i ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi *immj ʦartər a mipaŋaŋan. ****nai "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u amiɾika to~u tajwan" a nitəɾəkan manəŋnəŋ to~u, taɾaʦo~uwa o~u sifo~u no~u amiɾika o~u sakaŋaʡaj sakaira no~u kitakit mafaɾiʦ ko~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak satao~uʡ, nikawrira, o~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan satəɾək no~u amiɾika matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ maɾaħəʦi ko~u sapipato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, itini i kararəmaj pikajkian, fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj pikajkian ɾao~uʦan, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u miʦo~ukəraj a iiŋ, aɬ~ɮajaj mikəħaraj to~u tajw*an. *****miɾifət miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u ɾao~uʦan no~u amiɾika, o~u sakafijo~uɾ ato~u sakafaɾiʦ sifo~u no~u amiɾika to~u satao~uʡ to~u tajwan, nano~ujaan sato~u o~u finawɾan no~u tajwan miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u saɬ~ɮama no~u amiɾika to~u pakajraan no~u tajwan. *****sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj
